name: SetVisibleScreen
doc:
SUB FASTCALL SetVisibleScreen(bankNumber AS UByte)

Set the visible screen (either bank5 or bank7) and update system variable BANKM.
Only works on 128K and compatible models.

Parameters:
    bankNumber (UByte): bank number 5 or 7

name: GetVisibleScreen
doc:
FUNCTION FASTCALL GetVisibleScreen() AS UByte

Return the visible screen bank (5 or 7) according to system variable BANKM.
Only works on 128K and compatible models.

name: ToggleVisibleScreen
doc:
SUB FASTCALL ToggleVisibleScreen()

Toggle the visible screen from bank5 to bank7 or from bank7 to bank5.
Only works on 128K and compatible models.

name: CopyScreen5ToScreen7
doc:
SUB CopyScreen5ToScreen7()

Copy contents of screen5 to screen7 (display file + attributes).
Only works on 128K and compatible models.

name: CopyScreen7ToScreen5
doc:
SUB CopyScreen7ToScreen5()

Copy contents of screen7 to screen5 (display file + attributes).
Only works on 128K and compatible models.

name: SetDrawingScreen5
doc:
SUB FASTCALL SetDrawingScreen5()

Set ScreenBufferAddr and AttrBufferAddr to screen5 ($4000/$5800).
Only works on 128K and compatible models.

name: SetDrawingScreen7
doc:
FUNCTION FASTCALL SetDrawingScreen7() AS UByte

Put screen7 at $c000 (if not already there) and set ScreenBufferAddr and AttrBufferAddr to screen7 ($c000/$d800).
Only works on 128K and compatible models.

Returns:
    UByte: bank that was at $c000 before (to restore it manually if needed)

name: ToggleDrawingScreen
doc:
SUB FASTCALL ToggleDrawingScreen()

Toggle ScreenBufferAddr and AttrBufferAddr between screen5 ($4000/$5800) and screen7 ($c000/$d800).
Only works on 128K and compatible models.

name: ChangeMaskedSpritesBackgroundSet
doc:
FUNCTION FASTCALL ChangeMaskedSpritesBackgroundSet() AS Byte

Toggle MaskedSpritesBackgroundSet between 0 and 1.

Returns:
    Byte: new value of MaskedSpritesBackgroundSet

name: SaveBackgroundAndDrawSprite
parameters: X AS UByte, Y AS UByte, backgroundDir AS UInteger, spriteImageDir AS UInteger
doc:
SUB FASTCALL SaveBackgroundAndDrawSprite(X AS UByte, Y AS UByte, backgroundDir AS UInteger, spriteImageDir AS UInteger)

Save background behind sprite and draw masked (AND+OR) sprite in screen.

Parameters:
    X (UByte):            X coordinate (0:left to 240:right)
    Y (UByte):            Y coordinate (0:up to 176:down)
    backgroundDir (UInteger): address where background will be saved
    spriteImageDir (UInteger): address where sprite image data begins

name: RestoreBackground
parameters: X AS UByte, Y AS UByte, backgroundDir AS UInteger
doc:
SUB FASTCALL RestoreBackground(X AS UByte, Y AS UByte, backgroundDir AS UInteger)

Restore a previously saved background in screen.

Parameters:
    X (UByte):            X coordinate (0:left to 240:right)
    Y (UByte):            Y coordinate (0:up to 176:down)
    backgroundDir (UInteger): address where saved background begins
